bank.title: Saved Bank Accounts
bank.security_note: Your financial data is encrypted and secure.
bank.alert_update_msg: To update your bank details, you must submit a new cancelled cheque or passbook photo for verification.

sections.s1_desc: By using Cravix Rider, you represent that you are at least 18 years old, possess a valid driving license, and have all required insurance and vehicle permits as per local regulations.
sections.s2_desc: Riders are independent contractors. You agree to complete accepted missions with reasonable care and speed. Continuous dismissal of accepted orders may result in temporary account suspension.
sections.s3_desc: Earnings are calculated per mission based on distance, time, and active surge bonuses. Bank withdrawals are settled via the registered account in your profile.
sections.s4_desc: You agree to maintain professionalism with merchants and customers. Any form of harassment or theft will lead to immediate permanent deactivation.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.empty_msg: Join missions to see your rank here!

orders.pause_sub: Go online to start receiving mission pings in your current sector.
orders.scanning_sub: Awaiting next high-priority delivery mission from Cravix Hub.

shifts.planner_sub: Configure your operational window to optimize mission priority and surge rewards.
shifts.success_sub: Your operational presets have been saved. You'll receive mission pings based on your updated schedule.

Providing a premium experience for our delivery partners.

heatmap.title: Live Demand
heatmap.insight_sub: Earn up to +₹40 extra per mission in the Red zones.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1_content: Cravix Rider collects personal information including but not limited to your name, contact details, KYC documents, and real-time location data to ensure accurate order matching and mission safety.
privacy.section2_content: While the app is on duty (Online), we track your location in the background. This is mandatory for delivery logistics and to provide you with high-demand heatmap data.
privacy.section3_content: All sensitive documents, including Aadhaar and Bank details, are encrypted using industry-standard protocols. We do not share your private documents with third parties without legal mandate.
privacy.section4_content: You have the right to access your data, request corrections, or deactivate your account at any time via the Support Hub.
privacy.footer: For any privacy concerns, contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@cravix.com

withdraw.title: Cash in Hand
withdraw.info_footer: Tapping an icon will secure-launch your chosen app to verify the transaction.

alert.invalid_amt_msg: Please enter a valid collection amount.
alert.insufficient_funds_msg: You cannot deposit more than your available cash in hand.
alert.app_not_found_msg: We couldn't find {{appName}} on your device. Please install it or choose another payment method.
alert.processing_msg: We've launched {{appName}} to confirm your settlement.
alert.error_launch_msg: Could not launch {{appName}}. Please try again.
alert.unexpected_error_msg: An unexpected error occurred while launching the payment app.

settings.title: Settings
settings.logout_alert: Are you sure you want to log out of your session?

alerts.title: Notifications
alerts.empty_sub: When you get notifications, they'll show up here.

guide.title: Operational Guide
guide.home_desc: Your central hub for operations. Toggle your status to start receiving orders, view live demand heatmaps, and access quick actions like withdrawals and alerts.
guide.shifts_desc: Plan your work hours effectively. Manage your scheduled shifts, opt-in for high-demand slots, and view your upcoming operational schedule.
guide.orders_desc: Track your delivery lifecycle. View active orders, follow detailed navigation routes, and review your historical mission data.
guide.earnings_desc: Monitor your growth. Access real-time earnings insights, daily breakdowns, and full transaction history for all completed missions.
guide.profile_desc: Manage your identity. Update personal info, maintain mandatory KYC documents, configure app settings, and access rider support.
guide.wallet_desc: Manage your cash in hand. Generate QR codes to receive customer payments, scan merchant codes for settlements, and withdraw your earnings instantly.
guide.footer_note: Need more help? Contact Rider Support in the Profile menu.

emergency.title: Emergency & Safety
emergency.guideline_1: Always wear a helmet and protective gear.
emergency.guideline_2: Follow all traffic rules and speed limits.
emergency.guideline_3: Keep your location sharing active during shifts.
emergency.sos_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to call {{type}}?

warning.question: WHAT HAPPENED?
warning.explanation: The delivery request pinged your device but was not accepted within the 60-second window.
warning.active_tip: Staying online and active ensures higher earnings.
warning.expert_tip_desc: Keep your phone volume up and the app in the foreground to catch high-surge missions instantly!

instructions.title: Rider Guide
instructions.help_note: Need more help? Check the support center in your profile.

steps.s1_desc: Toggle the switch on your dashboard to start receiving delivery requests.
steps.s2_desc: Review task details and tap Accept within 30 seconds to lock in the mission.
steps.s3_desc: Navigate to the merchant, verify items, and deliver directly to the client.
steps.s4_desc: Monitor your earnings and mission bonuses in real-time on your dashboard.

verification.title: Identity Verification
verification.instruction: Position your face within the frame and ensure good lighting.
verification.perm_sub: We need camera access to verify your identity before starting the delivery.

statements.title: Account Statements
statements.info_note: Statements are generated on the 1st of every month and include all finalized mission payouts.

faqs.q1: How do I accept a mission?
faqs.a1: Go online on the dashboard and wait for a ping. Tap 'Accept' within 30 seconds.
faqs.q2: What if I can't find the hub?
faqs.a2: Use the built-in navigation or contact support via WhatsApp.
faqs.q3: When do I get my payouts?
faqs.a3: Daily earnings are settled every Monday, or you can use instant withdrawal.
faqs.a4: Surge is based on high demand in your current sector.
faqs.a5: Yes, update your RC details in the Vehicle Information section.
faqs.a6: Use the SOS button on the dashboard for immediate assistance.

zones.rule_1: Priority order matching within this 3km radius.
zones.rule_2: Standard fuel surcharge applies for long-distance missions.
zones.footer_note: Zone change requests are processed within 24-48 business hours.

earnings.goal_insight: You are on track to hit your daily goal!
